tasks.title: BUG: Worker spawned task/T<id> branches inherit orphan history (test fixtures, unrelated commits) — must always start from clean main
DECISION: Reject gitnexus O(m²) implicit wiring approach for Swift; explicit-import Swift extraction REQUIRED follow-up (split — see T1841 + T1842)
T1874: brain + studio getCleoHome — eliminate hand-rolled paths use env-paths or import from core
AUDIT: packages/cleo/src/dispatch/engines/ package-boundary violations — relocate non-dispatch business logic to packages/core/
BUG: Project hash drift — same project resolving to TWO different hashes (4f2a513f66dcb422 vs 1e3146b7352ba279) — must be deterministic + registered per-project
ADR-051 + ADR-062 ordering bug: evidence validation runs BEFORE merge, fails commit-reachability check
Test gap: integration test for spawn worktree provisioning failure paths
LOC reduction: derive TasksHandler.getSupportedOperations() from QUERY_OPS Set (eliminate 3-source-of-truth)
EPIC: Cleo Nexus edge completeness — DEFINES + ACCESSES + METHOD_OVERRIDES + METHOD_IMPLEMENTS emission (currently 0 emission for declared schema types)
T1870: rebase T1867 + extract bridge to core
EPIC: 3-way honest benchmark validation — cleo nexus vs gitnexus vs graphify, replace SUPERSESSION-EVIDENCE.md with corrected numbers
EPIC: Steal-from-graphify capability set + token-cheap LLM enrichment ladder — beat graphify on cost while matching/exceeding agent-token-reduction value
MASTER EPIC: Nexus Restructure — cleo graph + narrowed cleo nexus, scope-map SSoT, LAFS meta._nexus, R1 surgical split + R2 DB topology
BUG: nexus.db shared-db test pollution — 4668 projects (89k+ nodes) from test runs bloating all query scans
